description:
The hospital billing department requires a new field to track the National Provider Identifier (NPI) for all doctors. Create a new Provider Attribute Type in the OpenMRS Administration interface with the following specifications:

- Name: National Provider Identifier
- Description: 10-digit unique identification number for health care providers
- Datatype: Free Text
- Min Occurrences: 0
- Max Occurrences: 1

Login credentials: superman/Admin123.

metadata.expected_description: 10-digit unique identification number for health care providers
